name: Smart Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating substantial scale and institutional credibility in the alternative finance space.

FirstCash's core business focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through multiple revenue streams. Primary services include pawn loans (small non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property), retail sales of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments, gold/precious metals buying, and layaway services with 10% down payment options. The company also operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint and integrated service model. With over 2,500 stores across North and Latin America and a national network of retail finance partners, the company offers unmatched accessibility compared to independent pawn shops. Their technology-driven point-of-sale systems and emphasis on serving underbanked populations provide modern infrastructure alongside traditional pawn lending.

The company legitimately serves consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks, though pawn loans carry inherent costs through the buy-back spread between loan and redemption values. As a publicly traded corporation, FirstCash operates under SEC oversight and established compliance frameworks, but consumers should understand that pawn lending is fundamentally a collateral-based transaction, not a debt solution, and carries risk of item loss if loans aren't repaid.
address: 1350 E Palm Valley Blvd #300, Round Rock, TX 78664

company_info.headquarters: 1350 E Palm Valley Blvd #300, Round Rock, TX 78664

pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America provide exceptional accessibility and convenience
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) with established compliance, SEC oversight, and transparency
No credit check required for pawn loans, serving credit-constrained consumers excluded from traditional banking
Immediate cash funding on-site with transparent buy-back terms tied to physical collateral
Diverse merchandise inventory (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments) creates secondary market opportunities
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option for purchasing merchandise
Gold and precious metals buying service pays cash on spot for immediate liquidity
Non-recourse loans mean borrower has no further obligation beyond losing pledged item
cons: Pawn loans carry significant implicit costs through spread between loan value and item redemption value (typically 30-50% markup)
Risk of permanent item loss if loan cannot be repaid, affecting sentimental or irreplaceable property
Limited to collateral-based lending only; cannot address underlying cash flow or debt problems
Retail merchandise quality and inventory vary significantly by location, affecting secondary market value
Transaction-based model incentivizes item acquisition over consumer financial stability
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000) without credit checks or income verification
Individuals with valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, instruments) seeking short-term liquidity
Credit-constrained borrowers excluded from traditional bank loans and credit products
Bargain hunters seeking discounted merchandise through retail sales of pawned items
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies ($100-$5,000) who have valuable collateral and cannot access traditional bank loans or credit products. The critical caveat is that pawn lending is not a debt solution but a collateral transaction—borrowers must redeem items at higher prices or lose them permanently, making this unsuitable for addressing underlying financial instability or debt problems.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Layaway services with 10% down payment plans
Store locator and inventory search across 2,500+ locations
Lease-to-own financing through AFF subsidiary network (15,000+ merchant partners)
Retail payment solutions for consumer goods and services
Fast pawn loan processing with on-site funding
